name: flatulence
description: Passage of excessive amounts of gas and the feeling of abdominal fullness and bloating.
definition: Passage of excessive amounts of gas and the feeling of abdominal fullness and bloating.

name: mucus in stool
description: Abnormally increased amount of mucus in the feces. Mucus is a slippery aqueous secretion produced by mucous membranes including those of the intestines.
definition: Abnormally increased amount of mucus in the feces. Mucus is a slippery aqueous secretion produced by mucous membranes including those of the intestines.

name: fatigue
description: Persistent tiredness and lack of energy
definition: A subjective feeling of tiredness characterized by a lack of energy and motivation.

name: back pain
description: An unpleasant sensation characterized by physical discomfort (such as pricking, throbbing, or aching) localized to the back.
definition: An unpleasant sensation characterized by physical discomfort (such as pricking, throbbing, or aching) localized to the back.

name: frequent urination
definition: Needing to urinate often

name: urinary urgency
description: Urge incontinence is the strong, sudden need to urinate.
definition: Urge incontinence is the strong, sudden need to urinate.

name: urinary retention
description: Inability to completely empty the urinary bladder during the process of urination.
definition: Inability to completely empty the urinary bladder during the process of urination.

name: bowel incontinence
description: Loss of control over bowel movements
definition: Involuntary fecal soiling in adults and children who have usually already been toilet trained.

name: urticaria
description: Raised itchy welts on the skin
definition: Raised, well-circumscribed areas of erythema and edema involving the dermis and epidermis. Urticaria is intensely pruritic, and blanches completely with pressure.

name: swelling of face lips or tongue
definition: Swelling affecting facial tissues

name: Pruritus
description: Irritating sensation causing desire to scratch
definition: Pruritus is an itch or a sensation that makes a person want to scratch. This term refers to an abnormally increased disposition to experience pruritus.

name: erythema
definition: Redness of the skin, caused by hyperemia of the capillaries in the lower layers of the skin.
synonyms: Redness of skin or mucous membrane

name: cough
description: Sudden expulsion of air from lungs
definition: A sudden, audible expulsion of air from the lungs through a partially closed glottis, preceded by inhalation.

name: wheezing
definition: A high-pitched whistling sound associated with labored breathing.

name: shortness of breath
definition: Difficulty breathing or feeling breathless

name: Chest pain described as pressure
description: Pressure or tight sensation in chest
definition: Discomfort in the chest described as pressure, heaviness, or tightness.

name: throat tightness
definition: Constriction feeling in throat

name: hoarse voice
definition: Hoarseness refers to a change in the pitch or quality of the voice, with the voice sounding weak, very breathy, scratchy, or husky.

name: nasal congestion
definition: Reduced ability to pass air through the nasal cavity often leading to mouth breathing.

name: Rhinorrhea
definition: Increased discharge of mucus from the nose.

name: sneezing
description: Sudden involuntary expulsion of air through nose
definition: Sudden involuntary expulsion of air through nose

name: Difficulty in swallowing
definition: Difficulty swallowing

name: choking sensation
definition: Feeling of airway blockage

name: abdominal pain
description: An unpleasant sensation characterized by physical discomfort (such as pricking, throbbing, or aching) and perceived to originate in the abdomen. Abdominal pain can be crampy, achy, dull, intermittent or sharp. The terms stomach ache and stomach cramps are nonmedical terms often used to describe pain in the mid- or upper abdominal area, even though it is not the case that the (smooth) muscles of the stomach or the abdomen have cramps. Stomach pain is another layperson term commonly used to refer to abdominal pain.
definition: An unpleasant sensation characterized by physical discomfort (such as pricking, throbbing, or aching) and perceived to originate in the abdomen.

name: nausea and vomiting
description: Nausea is a commonly encountered symptom that has been defined as an unpleasant painless subjective feeling that one will imminently vomit. Vomiting has been defined as the forceful expulsion of the contents of the stomach, duodenum, or jejunum through the oral cavity. While nausea and vomiting are often thought to exist on a temporal continuum, this is not always the case. There are situations when severe nausea may be present without emesis and less frequently, when emesis may be present without preceding nausea.
definition: Nausea is a commonly encountered symptom that has been defined as an unpleasant painless subjective feeling that one will imminently vomit. Vomiting has been defined as the forceful expulsion of the contents of the stomach, duodenum, or jejunum through the oral cavity. While nausea and vomiting are often thought to exist on a temporal continuum, this is not always the case. There are situations when severe nausea may be present without emesis and less frequently, when emesis may be present without preceding nausea.

name: diarrhea
description: Abnormally increased frequency (usually defined as three or more) loose or watery bowel movements a day.
definition: Abnormally increased frequency (usually defined as three or more) loose or watery bowel movements a day.

name: Pallor
description: Abnormal skin coloration due to oxygen issues
definition: Abnormally pale skin.

name: cyanosis
description: Abnormal skin coloration due to oxygen issues
definition: Bluish discoloration of the skin and mucosa due to poor circulation or inadequate oxygenation of arterial or capillary blood.

name: weak pulse
definition: A diminution in the amplitude (strength) of the pulse such that the examiner has difficulty feeling the pulse.

name: Loss of consciousness
definition: Loss of alertness and orientation to place and time.

name: dizziness
definition: Feeling lightheaded or unsteady

name: anxiety
definition: Intense feelings of nervousness, tension, or panic often arise in response to interpersonal stresses. There is worry about the negative effects of past unpleasant experiences and future negative possibilities. Individuals may feel fearful, apprehensive, or threatened by uncertainty, and they may also have fears of falling apart or losing control.

name: sense of doom
description: Feeling something bad is about to happen
definition: Feeling something bad is about to happen

name: headache
definition: Cephalgia, or pain sensed in various parts of the head, not confined to the area of distribution of any nerve.

name: uterine cramps
definition: Painful contractions in uterus

name: Parageusia
definition: A distortion of the sense of taste, often characterized by the sensation of a metallic taste.

name: stomach pain
definition: Pain or discomfort in abdomen

name: fever
definition: Body temperature elevated above the normal range.

name: bloody diarrhea
definition: Passage of many stools containing blood.

name: dehydration
description: Loss of body fluids causing dryness and weakness
definition: Loss of body fluids causing dryness and weakness

name: abdominal pain
definition: An unpleasant sensation characterized by physical discomfort (such as pricking, throbbing, or aching) and perceived to originate in the abdomen.

name: bloating
description: Feeling of fullness or swelling in abdomen
definition: Feeling of fullness or swelling in abdomen

name: gas
definition: Excess gas in digestive tract

name: cognitive impairment
definition: Abnormal cognition is characterized by deficits in thinking, reasoning, or remembering.

name: constipation
definition: Infrequent or difficult evacuation of feces.

name: depression
definition: Frequently experiencing feelings of being down, miserable, and/or hopeless; struggling to recover from these moods; having a pessimistic outlook on the future; feeling a pervasive sense of shame; having a low self-worth; experiencing thoughts of suicide and engaging in suicidal behavior.

name: migraine
definition: Migraine is a chronic neurological disorder characterized by episodic attacks of headache and associated symptoms.

name: iron deficiency anemia
description: Low iron causing reduced red blood cells
definition: Low iron causing reduced red blood cells

name: itchy blistering skin rash
definition: Blistering rash causing itching

name: joint pain
definition: Pain in joints

name: missed periods
definition: Absence of menstrual cycle

name: oral ulcers
description: Erosion of the mucous mebrane of the mouth with local excavation of the surface, resulting from the sloughing of inflammatory necrotic tissue.
definition: Erosion of the mucous mebrane of the mouth with local excavation of the surface, resulting from the sloughing of inflammatory necrotic tissue.

name: peripheral neuropathy
description: Peripheral neuropathy is a general term for any disorder of the peripheral nervous system. The main clinical features used to classify peripheral neuropathy are distribution, type (mainly demyelinating versus mainly axonal), duration, and course.
definition: Peripheral neuropathy is a general term for any disorder of the peripheral nervous system. The main clinical features used to classify peripheral neuropathy are distribution, type (mainly demyelinating versus mainly axonal), duration, and course.

name: weight loss
definition: Reduction of total body weight.

name: Non-spinning vertigo
description: A perception of unsteadiness of dizziness that is not characterized bythe spinning sensation of classic vertigo, but rather by an oscillatory perception (rocking, bobbing, or swaying despite the fact that the subject is not moving).
definition: A perception of unsteadiness of dizziness that is not characterized bythe spinning sensation of classic vertigo, but rather by an oscillatory perception (rocking, bobbing, or swaying despite the fact that the subject is not moving).

name: vertigo
description: An abnormal sensation of spinning while the body is actually stationary.
definition: An abnormal sensation of spinning while the body is actually stationary.

name: tinnitus
description: The perception of sound in the absence of an external source. It is often described as a ringing, buzzing, hissing, or roaring sound in the ears.
definition: Tinnitus is an auditory perception that can be described as the experience of sound, in the ear or in the head, in the absence of external acoustic stimulation.
